---
name: Documentation Clarification
about: Help us make better documentation!
title: 'Docs(insert scope here): update documentation with clarification'
labels: documentation
assignees: k8redfern
type: Task

---

**Issue Title**
A title template is provided, but please see the commit subject line guidance from our [contribution guidelines](https://brainhealthlabstfx.github.io/AnalysisMultiverse/contributing_wrapper.html#subject-line) for more details.

**Please specify the code file:**
Ideally, an absolute path, but a file name is also acceptable.

**Applicable Lines**
Please specify the line numbers for the section of documentation. e.g. Function documentation on lines 38-42. If it is meant for the whole file (e.g. a README), please write "general".

**What needs clarification?**
Tell us what part of the documentation needs clarification. Is something written in a confusing way? Does it not give enough details? Are the instructions missing information for a specific type of user? Be as specific as possible.

**Additional context?**
Add any other context about the documentation request here.
